qa.question: When did Caroline go to the LGBTQ support group?
What did Caroline research about adoption?
What hobby does Melanie enjoy outdoors?
Is there a unicorn in the conversation?

session_1.speaker: Melanie
session_1.text: Hey Caroline, how was your week?

session_1.speaker: Caroline
session_1.text: I went to the LGBTQ support group on 7 May 2023, it was really affirming.

session_1.speaker: Melanie
session_1.text: I'm getting into camping lately, planning a big trip.

session_2.speaker: Caroline
session_2.text: I've been thinking about starting a family.

session_2.speaker: Caroline
session_2.text: I spent the weekend researching adoption agencies and their requirements.

session_2.speaker: Melanie
session_2.text: That's a big step, good for you.

session_2.speaker: Melanie
session_2.text: We should go hiking together sometime, outdoors is my happy place.
